'''Reena Province''' was a section of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] ruled by [[House Reena/Legends|House Reena]]. [[Merrick and Kalb Industries]] were based in the Reena Province.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''
